items.title: Man Utd's Bruno Fernandes equals PL assist record
items.summary: Manchester United's Bruno Fernandes has equalled the Premier League record for the most assists recorded in a season after registering his 20th of the campaign.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Day three of Kent v Durham at Beckenham washed out
items.summary: The third day of Kent v Durham in the County Championship is washed out after heavy overnight rain at Beckenham.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: U.S. rebounds at hockey worlds, beats Britain
items.summary: The defending champion United States men's hockey team bounced back from a loss to Switzerland with a 5-1 victory over tournament newcomer Britain at the world championships.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
